rail.text:
Joint Problem
            Cold slows resiliency
            Known damage becomes operating history.
          
          First WarningCold JointWarning Becomes ProcessProcessed Warning
          A compressed O-ring at 75 degrees Fahrenheit could return toward its shape far faster than one at 30 degrees Fahrenheit.
